creator: ether@cpan.org
text:
Test::DependentModules is only used for author testing, and should NOT be a
 dependency for normal, user-based installations.
 
 Where can I see a list of the current package's dependencies?
 
 thanks,
 
 Karen Etheridge, karen@etheridge.ca       GCS C+++$ USL+++$ P+++$ w--- M++
